system.description:
What it does (SRD): When the creature grapples or sometimes when it pounces, it can make extra natural attacks (usually two claw rakes) at the listed attack bonus against a grappled or appropriate target.

ThirdEra: Add rake attacks to the NPC’s Natural attacks list on the sheet (or note them in Description) so attack bonuses match the stat block. This template keeps Mechanical effects and Capability grants empty.
